ValidationRule.description: When Status = Waiting on Parts/Materials, Work Order, Defective Part and Part Order Number fields must be populated.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND(ISPICKVAL( SVMX_PS_Status__c, "Waiting on Parts/Materials"), OR(ISBLANK( SVMX_PS_Defective_Part__c ), ISBLANK( SVMX_PS_SAP_Part_Order_Number__c ), ISBLANK(SVMX_PS_Work_Order__c)))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: When the Status is Waiting on Parts/Materials, a Work Order, Defective Part and Parts Order Number must be entered.
